metadata.description: Turning coffee into clean code, scalable architecture and apps that solve real problems.

home.subtitle: Turning coffee into clean code, scalable architecture and apps that solve real problems.

about.title: About
about.description: Who's behind code-cleaner: goals, stack and how I work.
about.heading: About me
about.bio1: Hi! I'm Victor, a full stack developer who loves turning complex problems into simple solutions. I work from the database to the interface — Go on the backend, React and Next.js on the frontend — always guided by tests and code the next person can read.
about.bio2: My goal is to build apps that solve real problems, with scalable architecture and predictable deploys. This site is my lab: every feature starts with TDD, goes through CI and runs on Kubernetes — and what I learn along the way becomes a blog post.

roles.typescript: Strong typing from front to back

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Articles about clean code, architecture and what I learn building real apps.
blog.heading: Blog
blog.subtitle: What I learn by building — clean code, architecture and the decisions behind this site.
blog.emptyAll: // no posts published yet — check back soon

apps.title: Apps
apps.description: The monorepo's apps, each on its own subdomain of ccl.app.br.
apps.heading: Apps
apps.subtitlePrefix: The apps in this monorepo, each served on its own subdomain of

items.code-cleaner: This site: portfolio and blog with its own Go API, Markdown posts in PostgreSQL and a persistence-first contact form.
items.url-shortener: URL shortener with low-latency redirects (in-memory cache), async click analytics and custom aliases. Go API on the same cluster; short links at curto.ccl.app.br.
items.mobile-app: Upcoming mobile app for the ecosystem, sharing the monorepo's UI and utility packages.
items.docs: Upcoming technical documentation hub — architecture, decisions and contribution guides.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch: send your message and I'll reply by email.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind, a role, or just want to talk about code? Send me a message — I read them all and reply by email.
contact.name: Name
contact.hint: Your message is saved and I get a notification.
contact.error: Couldn't send right now. Please try again in a moment.
contact.successText: Thanks for reaching out! I'll reply to the email you provided.

shortener.title: URL Shortener
shortener.description: URL shortener with low-latency redirects and click analytics — a Go API running on the same Kubernetes cluster.
shortener.heading: URL Shortener
shortener.subtitle: Paste a long URL and get a short link. Redirects are served by a Go API (in-memory cache for hot links) and every click feeds the metrics dashboard asynchronously, without slowing the redirect down.
